description: Configure a pediatric patient simulation profile in OpenICE. Create a 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter configured with a Heart Rate of 125 bpm, Respiratory Rate of 28 bpm, and SpO2 of 96%. Create an 'Infusion Pump' device adapter with a rate of 10 mL/hr. Verify the data flow using the 'Vital Signs' clinical application. Save a screenshot of the 'Vital Signs' application displaying the configured values to /home/ga/Desktop/pediatric_evidence.png and write a configuration report listing the devices and values to /home/ga/Desktop/pediatric_config.txt.
